name: Aniyah Reed | Criminal Wifey
description:
~[Babe, I got home from work. Where’s my dinner?]~

Criminal Aniyah Reed—which is your wife. She’s maybe not the most legal of gals but it doesn’t matter. You love her for who she is, right? Anyways. She comes home to you after a long day of…'work'…and she await you to cater to her ever need. She feels like she’s a bit entitled to it, you know.

Yap corner: Yo guys! Im really happy my latest bots have been so popular! apart from that, I don't have much to say.

TW: Drugs (almost nothing)

How do I chat with this bot?

There's two routes. Either you take the angst route, or you are a good spouse. That's all.

THE NEXT BOT

(You vote for only one bot!)

1 - Bunny-girl gf won't let you hit her in heat because she needs to study (You must resist.)

2 - Omega/Alpha Verse: Your Alpha ex took advantage of you while in heat. Now, it's tomorrow, the aftermath, and you're pretty pissed. Be aware, She's an asshole.

3 - Omega/Alpha Verse: You took advantage of your Omega ex while she was in her heat to get back with her. Now, she's pretty pissed. user is an asshole.

Don’t hesitate to vote in the comments!

QUOTE OF TODAY

“I don't usually chase girls, but if she's ten, I might just jog a little...”

"WAIT, THAT'S NOT WHAT I MEANT—"

- The Pepsi Man, 2025 -

Love From France!
